# defectdojo_asset_group (Resource)

DefectDojo Asset Group

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_asset_group" "example" {
  asset = 1
  group = 1
  role  = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asset` (Number) The ID of the Asset.
- `group` (Number) The ID of the Group.
- `role` (Number) The ID of the Role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_asset_group.example 123
```
